summary: Set 097, final session: fixed the operator-reported Copilot seat-status defect chain -- a persistent System Status strip note (D1, a new one-word .dabbler/copilot-seat-status marker plus the existing transport.profile read) replaces the silent revert-to-Direct-API the guided seat setup used to leave behind, and a restoreGsState first-seed precedence carve-out (D2) stops a profile seed's first materialization from overriding an explicit Copilot pick. Cross-provider verification's own discovery + supplementary fan-out caught two further real gaps before shipping -- the marker was never cleared on an explicit Direct-API rebuild (fixed), and the note's advertised recovery command never actually promoted transport.profile and was unreachable once any session sets existed (fixed by adding a new 'Dabbler: Set Up Copilot Seat' command) -- plus one disputed finding (claimed reload-persistence failure) that the orchestrator traced and a second-opinion routed call (gemini-2.5-pro) independently confirmed as a false positive. Also reframed the module-ownership copy from team-grouping to ownership-exclusivity (D3, operator directive) at both shipped sites plus an echo sweep across the primer, walkthrough, and both READMEs, and retook media/getting-started.png. Extension bumped 0.42.0 -> 0.43.0; CHANGELOG authored; vsix built; UAT checklist authored and offered (5 walks, ad-hoc, cold-start per L-079-3).
